untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This excerpt describes entry conditions and trend-following philosophy. It specifies WHEN to enter (trend direction, MA crossover, ADX > 25) but contains no position sizing guidance (no risk %, position % of capital, volatility scaling, or Kelly-based calculations). The statement about 'long tails' and 'major market moves' is market commentary/expectancy rationale, not a sizing rule.
